rows.comparability_group_label: KimiCode / Claude Code / Codex (model-specific; see note) · Kimi K3 max; peer settings follow source labels
rows.protocol_note: All Kimi K3 results use reasoning effort max, temperature 1.0, and top-p 1.0. Depending on the benchmark, models are evaluated with KimiCode, Claude Code, or Codex. Except ZeroBench, which follows the official setting and runs five times, all multimodal scores are averaged over three runs. MMMU-Pro preserves original input order and prepends images to text. Source label: Kimi K3 (max); reasoning configuration: max.
